name: Tomatillo Salsa Ala Art
recipeInstructions:
1. When serving over chicken or meat, chop the tomatillos and tomatoes into larger pieces than if serving as a dip.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Transfer mixture to a zipper bag and store in the refrigerator.
4. Turn the bag occasionally.
5. Can be prepared up to one day ahead of time.
6. Handle jalapenos with caution.
